case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK VS. ANTHONY G CRUZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 75522181) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 74659046) TO PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74659046) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, ANTHONY G NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-05-2025 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-02-2024 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-13-2025

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 75522181) AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, ANTHONY G
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-05-2025 CONTINUED TO APR-02-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, ANTHONY G $29,068.80 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $29,068.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75522181)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-02-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, ANTHONY G
